summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Automation Engine for Ventura Fresh Laundry CRM. Backend API tests achieved 100% success rate (33/33 tests passed). Frontend Operator Dashboard UI tests passed - login, dashboard display, order status update all working correctly.
passed_tests: API Health Check
Operator Dashboard Endpoint - returns stats, pickups, deliveries, urgent tickets
Daily Summary Endpoint - returns orders, tickets, quotes, leads stats
SLA Alerts Endpoint - returns past_sla, approaching_sla, total_at_risk
Ingest - Pickup request creates ORDER (source_form=PICKUP_REQUEST)
Ingest - pickup_date field triggers ORDER classification
Ingest - service_type with 'pickup' triggers ORDER
Ingest - B2B quote form creates QUOTE
Ingest - company_name field triggers QUOTE classification
Ingest - COMMERCIAL source form triggers QUOTE
Ingest - Support form creates TICKET
Ingest - issue_description field triggers SUPPORT classification
Auto-priority - 'refund' keyword creates HIGH priority ticket
Auto-priority - 'urgent' keyword creates HIGH priority ticket
Auto-priority - 'damaged' keyword creates HIGH priority ticket
Ingest - Contact form creates LEAD
Ingest - Generic form defaults to LEAD
Ingest - Preferences form saves PREFERENCES
Duplicate Detection - Same form submitted twice is rejected
Customer Upsert - New customer created for new email
Customer Upsert - Existing customer updated, not duplicated
Missing Contact Info - Submission without email AND phone rejected
Missing Contact Info - Email-only submission accepted
Missing Contact Info - Phone-only submission accepted
Order Status Update - Status changes from NEW to CONFIRMED to PICKED_UP
Order Status Update - Non-existent order returns 404
Operator Dashboard - Stats structure correct
Operator Dashboard - Today's pickups returned
Operator Dashboard - Urgent tickets returned
Daily Summary - Structure correct with all sections
SLA Alerts - Structure correct
Phone Normalization - 10-digit phone accepted
Phone Normalization - Formatted phone normalized
Frontend - Login with admin credentials works
Frontend - Operator Dashboard loads correctly
Frontend - Stats cards display (Pickups, Processing, Ready, Urgent)
Frontend - Today's pickups section shows orders
Frontend - Urgent tickets section shows HIGH priority tickets
Frontend - Refresh button works
Frontend - Order status update button works (CONFIRMED → PICKUP_SCHEDULED)
critical_code_review_comments: Automation engine correctly classifies forms based on source_form and field content
SLA calculation working correctly: HIGH=4hrs, MEDIUM=24hrs, LOW=72hrs
Duplicate detection uses dedup_key based on email/phone + source + timestamp
Customer upsert correctly finds existing customers by email OR phone
Order status update creates audit log and queues customer notification
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_automation_engine.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Automation Engine
seed_data_creation: Test orders, tickets, quotes, leads, and preferences created during automated tests with unique email patterns (test_*@example.com). Test data includes: ORD-20260214-0003 through ORD-20260214-0010+, TKT-20260214-0002 through TKT-20260214-0006+, QOT-20260214-0002+, LEAD-20260214-0001+
context_for_next_testing_agent: Automation Engine fully functional. Key endpoints: POST /api/automation/ingest (main entry point for all forms), GET /api/automation/operator-dashboard (operator view), GET /api/automation/daily-summary (stats), GET /api/automation/sla-alerts (SLA monitoring), PUT /api/automation/orders/{id}/status (operator action). Form classification: PICKUP_REQUEST/pickup_date → ORDER, B2B/company_name → QUOTE, SUPPORT/issue_description → TICKET, PREFERENCE/fabric_softener → PREFERENCES, default → LEAD. Auto-priority keywords: refund, urgent, damaged, missing, complaint → HIGH priority.

classification_rules.ORDER: source_form contains PICKUP, or pickup_date/pickup_time present, or service_type contains 'pickup'
classification_rules.QUOTE: source_form contains QUOTE/B2B/COMMERCIAL, or company_name/company_legal_name/industry present
classification_rules.SUPPORT: source_form contains SUPPORT/FEEDBACK/ISSUE, or issue_description present, or what_is_this_regarding contains issue/problem/complaint
classification_rules.PREFERENCES: source_form contains PREFERENCE, or fabric_softener/detergent_preference present
classification_rules.LEAD: default classification when no other rules match
